ability.arbalist.grave_mark.name: Grave Mark
ability.arbalist.grave_mark.description: Fire a marking bolt that amplifies primary damage against one target.
ability.arbalist.primary_crossbow.name: Crossbow
ability.arbalist.primary_crossbow.descri: Fire one narrow bolt that stops on the first enemy.
ability.arbalist.slipstep.name: Slipstep
ability.arbalist.slipstep.description: Reposition with damage reduction and empower the next primary bolt.
ability.arbalist.stillness.name: Stillness
ability.arbalist.stillness.description: Hold steady to gain Focused projectile speed and damage.
arena.prototype.bell_laboratory_01.name: Bell Laboratory
arena.prototype.bell_laboratory_01.descr: A fixed local combat laboratory for the First Playable benchmark.
boss.prototype.bell_proctor.name: Bell Proctor
boss.prototype.bell_proctor.description: A stationary three-phase benchmark boss using aimed fans, memory gap rings, and alternating cross lanes.
class.grave_arbalist.name: Grave Arbalist
class.grave_arbalist.description: A precision ranged survivor built around marking and controlled repositioning.
consumable.red_tonic.name: Red Tonic
enemy.bell_reed.name: Bell Reed
enemy.bell_reed.description: A stationary pressure enemy that fires rotating gap rings.
enemy.chain_sentry.name: Chain Sentry
enemy.chain_sentry.description: An armored anchor that alternates crossing lane attacks.
enemy.drowned_pilgrim.name: Drowned Pilgrim
enemy.drowned_pilgrim.description: A fodder pursuer that fires a short aimed fan.
item.prototype.armor.parish_leather.name: Parish Leather
item.prototype.armor.parish_leather.desc: Forged armor with health and armor at a small movement cost.
item.prototype.armor.reedcloth_wraps.des: Worn armor that adds eight maximum health.
item.prototype.armor.saltglass_coat.name: Saltglass Coat
item.prototype.armor.saltglass_coat.desc: Oathed armor trading health for armor and veil resistance.
item.prototype.charm.still_eye.name: Still Eye
item.prototype.charm.still_eye.descripti: Activates Stillness faster with a smaller Focused damage bonus.
item.prototype.charm.undertaker_knot.des: Improves Red Tonic healing and lengthens its shared cooldown.
item.prototype.relic.dented_scope.name: Dented Scope
item.prototype.relic.dented_scope.descri: Extends Grave Mark range to twelve tiles.
item.prototype.relic.mark_lens.name: Mark Lens
item.prototype.relic.mark_lens.descripti: Extends Grave Mark duration while changing its primary bonus.
item.prototype.relic.slip_clasp.name: Slip Clasp
item.prototype.relic.slip_clasp.descript: Shortens Slipstep cooldown and its empowered-shot window.
item.prototype.weapon.grave_repeater.des: A fast Forged crossbow with lower bolt damage and range.
A slow Oathed crossbow with long range and heavy bolts.
item.prototype.weapon.pine_crossbow.name: Pine Crossbow
item.prototype.weapon.pine_crossbow.desc: A balanced Worn crossbow and First Playable starter weapon.
item.prototype.weapon.scatterbow.name: Scatterbow
item.prototype.weapon.scatterbow.descrip: A Relic crossbow firing three spread bolts with a two-hit target cap.
pattern.enemy.bell_reed.gap_ring.name: Gap Ring
pattern.enemy.bell_reed.gap_ring.descrip: Six veil projectiles leave a rotating adjacent two-index gap.
pattern.enemy.chain_sentry.cross_lanes.d: Two telegraphed physical lanes alternate cardinal and diagonal axes.
pattern.enemy.drowned_pilgrim.fan.name: Pilgrim Fan
pattern.enemy.drowned_pilgrim.fan.descri: Three physical bolts fire at minus fifteen, zero, and plus fifteen degrees.
pattern.prototype.bell_proctor.aimed_fan: Five locked-aim veil bolts spread across minus twenty through plus twenty degrees.
pattern.prototype.bell_proctor.cross_lan: Two Major physical lanes alternate cardinal and diagonal axes after a clear warning.
Twelve veil projectiles leave a four-index gap that advances deterministically.
reward.prototype.boss.name: Boss Reward
reward.prototype.boss.description: Three distinct equipment selections and two Red Tonics.
reward.prototype.normal_enemy.name: Enemy Reward
reward.prototype.normal_enemy.descriptio: Independent equipment and Red Tonic checks.
reward.prototype.wave_1.name: Wave One Reward
reward.prototype.wave_1.description: One weighted weapon and one Red Tonic.
reward.prototype.wave_2.name: Wave Two Reward
reward.prototype.wave_2.description: One weighted relic and one weighted armor.
reward.prototype.wave_3.name: Wave Three Reward
reward.prototype.wave_3.description: One weighted charm and one nonduplicate global equipment selection.
